zh.lifeSummary: 當Gerard de Bournonville於大約1030年出生時，他的父親Guillaume II de Bournonville-9歲，母親Adélaïde de Rollancourt de Hesdin17歲。他於大約1078年與Elsberg Seclis在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯洛藍古特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1084年享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gerard de Bournonville于大约1030年出生时，他的父亲Guillaume II de Bournonville-9岁，母亲Adélaïde de Rollancourt de Hesdin17岁。他于大约1078年与Elsberg Seclis在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯洛藍古特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1084年享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gerard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from gār, gēr ‘spear’ + hard ‘brave, hardy, strong’. In the later Middle Ages this was a more common name than Gerald , with which it was sometimes confused. Nowadays it is less common, surviving mainly among Roman Catholics, in honour of the many saints of this name.

variants.name: Gerrard
meanings: Variant spelling of   Gerard  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Jerrard
meanings: Rare variant spelling of   Gerard  , probably influenced by the form of the modern surname, if not a transferred use.

en.lifeSummary: When Gerard de Bournonville was born about 1030, his father, Guillaume II de Bournonville, was -9 and his mother, Adélaïde de Rollancourt de Hesdin, was 17. He married Elsberg Seclis about 1078, in Rollancourt, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1084, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gerard de Bournonville est né environ 1030, son père, Guillaume II de Bournonville, avait -9 ans et sa mère, Adélaïde de Rollancourt de Hesdin, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Elsberg Seclis environ 1078, à Rollancourt, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1084, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gerard de Bournonville um 1030 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guillaume II de Bournonville -9 und seine Mutter Adélaïde de Rollancourt de Hesdin 17. Er hat um 1078 in Rollancourt, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich Elsberg Seclis geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1084 im Alter von 55 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gerard de Bournonville è nato il circa 1030, il suo padre, Guillaume II de Bournonville, aveva -9 anni e il suo madre, Adélaïde de Rollancourt de Hesdin, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Elsberg Seclis circa 1078, nel Rollancourt, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1084, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gerard de Bournonvilleが約1030年に生まれた時，父Guillaume II de Bournonvilleは-9歳，母Adélaïde de Rollancourt de Hesdinは17歳であった。約1078年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスロランコウルトでElsberg Seclisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1084年に55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gerard de Bournonville(이)가 대략 1030년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guillaume II de Bournonville(은)는 -9세였고, 그의 어머니 Adélaïde de Rollancourt de Hesdin(은)는 17세였다. 그는 대략 1078년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 롤랭쿠르트에서 Elsberg Seclis(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1084년 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gerard de Bournonville nasceu aproximadamente 1030, seu pai, Guillaume II de Bournonville, tinha -9 anos e sua mãe, Adélaïde de Rollancourt de Hesdin, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Elsberg Seclis aproximadamente 1078, em Rollancourt, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1084, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gerard de Bournonville родился около 1030 г., его отцу по имени Guillaume II de Bournonville было -9 год, а матери, которую звали Adélaïde de Rollancourt de Hesdin, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Elsberg Seclis около 1078 г. в местности ролланкоурт, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1084 г. в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gerard de Bournonville nació aproximadamente 1030, su papá, Guillaume II de Bournonville, tenía -9 años y su mamá, Adélaïde de Rollancourt de Hesdin, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Elsberg Seclis aproximadamente 1078, en Rollancourt, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1084, a la edad de 55 años.
